allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat/stream -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""user_id"":""test123"",""message"":""Hii how are you"",""session_id"":""sess_test2""}' --max-time 15)

Bash(curl -v -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat/stream -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""user_id"""":""""abc123"""",""""message"""":""""Hii how are you"""",""""session_id"""":""""session_abc"""",""""mood"""":null,""""user_context"""":null}' --max-time 15)
Bash(curl -v -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8000/api/chat/stream -H "Origin: http://localhost:5173" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat/stream -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Origin: http://localhost:5173" -d '{""user_id"":""testuser"",""message"":""hii how are you"",""session_id"":""session_abc123"",""user_context"":""USER JOURNAL ENTRIES: User wrote on Mar 28 — \\""test\\"": Some journal text here. Mood: Okay.""}' --max-time 15)
